name: Budget Transparency
description: Public budget transparency dashboard with sankey visualizations, category drill-down, and expenditure tables. Exposes municipal budget flows to citizens in navigable detail.

page_briefs.budget: Budget overview opens with a KPI grid summarizing total revenue, total expenditure, surplus or deficit, and per-capita spending for the current fiscal year. A large sankey diagram dominates the page, flowing revenue sources on the left through department allocations to spending categories on the right, with hover tooltips showing exact dollar amounts and percentages.
page_briefs.budget-category: Category detail page shows a chart grid with time-series spending trend, year-over-year comparison, and breakdown donut for the selected category. Below, a data table lists every line-item expenditure within the category with columns for vendor, description, amount, date, and approving department, with sorting and CSV export.

shells.sidebar-main: Left sidebar with budget category navigation and main content area
